message:
fix(analytics): critical bug in useWizardAnalytics and minor edge case

**Critical bug fixed in useWizardAnalytics.ts:**
- Same issue that was previously fixed in useLessonAnalytics
- The `hasTrackedView` ref didn't reset when navigating between wizard steps
- Changed to `trackedStepNumber` comparison (like useLessonAnalytics uses `trackedLessonId`)
- Also added stepNumber check in markComplete callback to prevent race conditions

**Minor edge case fixed in analytics.ts:**
- In trackLessonEnter, when first visiting lesson 0, the time calculation
  would incorrectly calculate ~0 seconds because previousLesson === lessonId
- Added `&& previousLesson !== lessonId` condition to skip calculation
  when visiting the same lesson (or first lesson visit)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
